title: CustomerDetails v1.0
description: PII identity and address details for a utility service customer. fullName appears ONLY here. CIM: cim:Customer (IEC 61968-1).

fullName.description: Full name of the customer as per ID proof.

careOf.description: Optional care-of (c/o) reference person used to uniquely identify / disambiguate a customer who may share the same fullName with others in a locality. Pairs a name with an optional, gender-neutral relationship.

name.description: Name of the care-of / reference person used to disambiguate the customer.

relationship.description: Gender-neutral relationship of the reference person to the customer.

installationAddress.description: Physical location of the metered installation. geo (GeoJSON Point) required; address (PostalAddress) optional.

serviceConnectionDate.description: Date and time the service connection was activated (ISO 8601 with timezone offset).
